description: Creates a line segment from a polygon edge by extracting edge data using item(). Useful for highlighting or working with individual edges of triangles and polygons.
utility: Create a line from a polygon edge

arguments.name: edge
arguments.description: Edge extracted from a polygon using item()

arguments.name: options
arguments.description: Color, dashed style, or stroke width

alternates.description: Line segment created from polygon edge extraction

examples.expression: line_a = line(graph_1, item(triangle_1, type(edge), 1), type(segment), c(blue))

examples.scenario: Segment from second edge of a polygon
